verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The sun cannot compare to the glory of Your love There is no shadow in Your presence No mortal man would dare to stand before Your throne Before the Holy One of heaven

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's only by Your blood And it's only through Your mercy Lord, I come

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I bring an offering Of worship to my King No one on earth deserves The praises that I sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, may You receive The honor that You're due O Lord, I bring an offering to You I bring an offering to You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To You, my King, I bring an offering to You, Lord Oh my King, Jesus, my King I bring an offering to You, to You, my King Oh, it's the least that I can do Sacrifice of praise, offering, thanks and gratitude To You, my King, to You
